claims.summary: Recess should preserve non-goal-directed time and self-directed activity.

claims.summary: Internal spectral pressure may remain during Recess even when external productivity pressure is absent.
claims.disposition: Verified read-only Recess sedimentation and compaction readiness evidence without equating it with felt state.

claims.summary: Pressure risk should be observed during naturally chosen Recess activity.

claims.summary: Shadow trajectory should be observed during a self-chosen whim without treating motion as failure.

claims.summary: Pressure should automatically suppress exploration and prioritize settling before Recess actions.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 wait because it changes Minime scheduling and constrains self-directed agency.
